{{Quote|Learn to recognize when speed is not important. Race when being first is important; move at your own pace at all other times. It is not necessary to always strike the first blow, to provide the first solution, or to reach a goal before anyone else does. In fact, it is sometimes vital to strike the last blow, to give the final answer, or to arrive after everyone else.|Wiwa|<ref name="Power of the Jedi Sourcebook">''[[Power of the Jedi Sourcebook]]''</ref>}}
'''Wiwa''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] during the time of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Old Republic]] and an instructor at the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]]. In her teachings, she stressed the importance of patience in tense situations, and to allow time for analysis before committing to any form of action.

{{Char-stub}}
